description: Admin By Request endpoint privilege management CLI: audit log, events, inventory, requests approval, and offline PIN codes with a local SQLite mirror.

tools.name: auditlog_delta
tools.description: Delta query for audit log changes (use timeNow/deltaTime ticks for resumable sync). Optional: startid, take (default: 100), deltaTime (plus 1 more). Returns the AuditLogDelta.

params.name: startid
params.description: Last seen id (entries with id greater than this are returned)

params.name: deltaTime
params.description: Last poll's timeNow value to detect updates after initial pull

params.name: timeNow
params.description: Current time in ticks (server returns its own timeNow when omitted)

tools.name: auditlog_list
tools.description: List audit log entries (admin sessions, app elevations, denied requests). Pagination is by id cursor. Optional: startid, take (default: 10), wantscandetails (plus 5 more). Returns array of AuditLogEntry.

params.name: startid
params.description: Return entries with id less than this value (cursor; 0 = newest)

params.name: wantscandetails
params.description: Set to 1 to include malware scan result detail

params.name: type
params.description: Filter by entry type (e.g. 'Admin Session', 'App Elevation')

params.name: settings
params.description: Filter by AbR settings profile name (e.g. 'Global')

tools.name: events_list
tools.description: List events. Use code filter to narrow to specific event types. Optional: startid, take (default: 10), code (plus 2 more). Returns array of EventEntry.

params.name: startid
params.description: Return events with id less than this value (cursor; 0 = newest)

params.name: code
params.description: Filter by event code (e.g. 40 = client installed)

tools.name: inventory_list
tools.description: List inventoried endpoints. Use wantsoftware/wanthardware to expand. Optional: take (default: 10), startid, wantsoftware (plus 4 more). Returns array of InventoryDevice.

params.name: startid
params.description: Return devices with id less than this value (cursor)

params.name: wantsoftware
params.description: Set to 1 to include installed software list per device

params.name: wanthardware
params.description: Set to 1 to include hardware spec per device

tools.name: inventory_pin
tools.description: Generate an offline elevation PIN code for a device. Pass --challenge for challenge-response mode. Required: computer. Optional: pintype, challenge. Returns the PinResult.

params.name: pintype
params.description: PIN mode: 'challenge' (admin reads challenge to user, gets back code) or omit for numeric PIN

params.name: challenge
params.description: Challenge code from the user when pintype=challenge

tools.name: requests_approve
tools.description: Approve a pending elevation request. Required: id, status (default: Approved). Optional: reason. Returns the updated ElevationRequest.

tools.name: requests_deny
tools.description: Deny a pending elevation request. Required: id, status (default: Denied). Optional: reason. Returns the updated ElevationRequest.

tools.name: requests_list
tools.description: List elevation requests filtered by status. Optional: status, startid, take (default: 10) (plus 3 more). Returns array of ElevationRequest.

params.name: status
params.description: Status filter: pending, approved, or denied

params.name: startid
params.description: Return requests with id less than this value (cursor)

params.name: wantscandetails
params.description: Set to 1 to include malware scan result detail
